title: Content Hub Organizer

statement.markdown:
## Projects Challenge: Content Hub Organizer

Your objective is to build a fully functional, highly interactive React component representing the target design mockup.

### 🎨 Color Palette
* `#B7D7CD`
* `#C06C88`
* `#411C56`
* `#F7D2C4`

### 📐 Target Design Mockup
Use the visual mockup shown in the panel to guide your coordinate alignment, container proportions, and spacing.

### 📌 Target Design SVG Source
The target geometry is defined by the following SVG vector graphic (viewable by the LLM judge):
```xml
<svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' width='400' height='300'><rect x='10' y='10' width='380' height='280' rx='10' fill='#090a0f'/><rect x='20' y='20' width='360' height='260' rx='10' fill='#B7D7CD'/><rect x='30' y='30' width='340' height='240' rx='10' fill='#C06C88'/><rect x='40' y='50' width='320' height='220' rx='10' fill='#411C56'/><text x='50' y='70' font-size='24' fill='#FFFFFF'>Categories</text><g transform='translate(50, 120)'><rect x='0' y='0' width='150' height='20' rx='10' fill='#411C56'/><text x='20' y='30' font-size='18' fill='#FFFFFF'>Article 1</text></g><g transform='translate(220, 120)'><rect x='0' y='0' width='150' height='20' rx='10' fill='#411C56'/><text x='20' y='30' font-size='18' fill='#FFFFFF'>Article 2</text></g><g transform='translate(50, 200)'><rect x='0' y='0' width='200' height='20' rx='10' fill='#411C56'/><text x='20' y='30' font-size='18' fill='#FFFFFF'>Tags: Tag 1, Tag 2</text></g></svg>
```

### ⚙️ Requirements
1. Match the visual presentation (layout, alignment, borders, colors) of the mockup.
2. Implement all necessary React state variables, event handlers, and input bindings to make the page interactive.
3. Make sure all interactive controls (buttons, forms, checkboxes, sliders) update the view correctly.

constraints: Must use only specified colors and layouts.
Must be fully interactive with state updates, filter functionality, and dynamic list updates.
Must display two articles with tags and allow user to switch between them.

referenceAssets.caption: Recreate target design: Content Hub Organizer

gradingCriteria.description: Evaluate how closely the layout, colors, and positioning match the target visual mockup.
Verify interactive state updates, filter functionality, dynamic list updates, and handlers.
Review code cleanliness, proper semantic elements, and efficient state use.
